configurePresets.name: windows-default
configurePresets.displayName: Windows x64: OpenSSL 3 + SQLCipher amalgamation (no vcpkg)
configurePresets.description: MM2/MM1/crypto: OpenSSL 3 libcrypto (AES-GCM, PBKDF2, RAND, Ed25519 EVP, SHA-256 EVP). SQLCipher: in-tree sqlite3.c + OpenSSL::SSL/Crypto. Optional: thirdparty/openssl/prebuilt/windows-x64/openssl or OPENSSL_ROOT_DIR. JNI off by default in this preset.
